api/socket-events.title: Socket.IO Events
api/socket-events.description: The server uses Socket.IO for all real-time communication. Connect to http3001.

architecture/agent-workspace.title: Agent Workspace
architecture/agent-workspace.description: Each agent gets a dedicated directory under workspaces///.

architecture/client.title: Client
architecture/client.description: The client is a React 19 + TypeScript application bundled with Vite.

architecture/overview.title: Overview
architecture/overview.description: Tonkatsu is a monorepo with two npm workspaces:

architecture/server.title: Server
architecture/server.description: The server is an Express + Socket.IO application written in TypeScript (ESM), running under tsx watch for hot-reload in development.

examples/first-agent.title: Your First Agent
examples/first-agent.description: This walkthrough creates a simple assistant agent from scratch.

examples/multi-agent-team.title: Multi-Agent Team
examples/multi-agent-team.description: This example sets up a two-agent team where a project manager delegates research tasks to an analyst.

examples/repo-backed-agent.title: Repo-Backed Agent
examples/repo-backed-agent.description: A repo-backed agent works directly inside a git repository. Its code changes are tracked in git, while its identity (SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, etc.) stays private.

examples/scheduled-tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
examples/scheduled-tasks.description: Agents can run tasks on a cron schedule — useful for daily reports, monitoring jobs, or periodic data syncs.
